notes: Zandronum rcon (Huffman-coded UDP, salted-MD5 auth) — verified live. rcon commands use the Doom/ZDoom console: `map`, `set <cvar>`, `get <cvar>`, `kick`, `addbot`. To control this server, enable the sidecar with RCON_PROTOCOL=zandronum and wire sv_rconpassword from a secret.

commands.name: change_map
commands.description: Load a map lump (e.g. MAP01, MAP07).

commands.name: add_bot
commands.description: Add a bot to the game.

name.description: Bot name (or empty for a random one)

cvars.name: fraglimit
cvars.description: Frags to end the map (0 = none).
